title: Jan Duursema
content:
{{Top|rwp}} {{Otheruses|Jan}} {{Citation}} {{Person |image=[[File:JanDuursema.jpg]] |name=Jan Duursema |birth= |death= |listedpronouns= |nationality= |occupation=*Penciller[[Star Wars (1977) 92|''Star Wars'' (1977) 92]] *Inker[[Chewbacca (2000) 2|''Chewbacca'' (2000) 2]] *Writer{{Tales|11|Ghost (comic story)}} |companies=*[[Marvel Comics|Marvel]] *[[Dark Horse Comics|Dark Horse]] |website=[http://www.janduursema.com JanDuursema.com] }} '''Jan Duursema''' is an artist who has illustrated many ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comics]] and has contributed stories alongside frequent collaborator [[John Ostrander]]. Duursema and Ostrander worked together on many ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' issues and continued their cooperation on ''[[Star Wars: Legacy]]''. ==Biography== Jan Duursema was the basis for the character [[Ur-Sema Du]]. She is the co-creator of multiple fan-favorite characters, such as [[Denin]] and [[Vila]] from [[Star Wars (1977) 92|''Star Wars'' (1977) 92]], the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] and her Master - [[Kiffar/Legends|Kiffar]] Jedi [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] from the [[Star Wars: Republic|''Republic'' series]] and [[Cade Skywalker]] and [[Darth Talon]] from the [[Star Wars: Legacy|''Legacy'' series]], for which she was also sometimes credited as co-writer. {{Artist-stub}} ==Works== ===Bibliography===
